nodes.label: AI for standardizing and summarizing documents
nodes.grounding_span: standardising CVs, historically that takes up a lot of time with weird fonts and boxes etc, secondly I like to save time with documents, I'll get TL:DRs from things like acronym laden job specs

nodes.label: AI for generating copy that requires finessing
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI for generating advertising copy for vacancies, but I will typically end up editing or tweaking manually, and I use AI for generating BD copy but again the time spent finessing to remove AI tells is almost not quite worth it atm

nodes.label: AI for personal representation and authentic communication
nodes.label_negative: AI for personal representation feels disrespectful
nodes.grounding_span: I still can't hand the reigns over to a bot for communications that represent ME, and I guess that applies to all avenues of my life, not just work, at the back of my mind it feels disrespectful to the recipient in a way

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner for iterative refinement
nodes.label_negative: AI as independent delegator without collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: for generating copy we tend to ping and pong between the two of us until I'm happy

nodes.label: AI for building expertise in unfamiliar domains
nodes.label_negative: Relying on own limited knowledge in unfamiliar domains
nodes.grounding_span: I was able to take suitable CVs, and analyse them for weaknesses using AI. Then, I was able to dilute these concerns into a few targeted questions the candidates could address. This resulted in one candidate in particular returning a set of bulleted refutations of the concerns, including examples of how and why the concerns are addressed. Then I was able to incorporate these BACK into the CV, rewrite the whole thing and tailor it to the role perfectly.

nodes.label: AI bridging tech gap and reactivating dormant skills
nodes.grounding_span: what I love about AI is it bridges that gap that has built up over the years, it's reactivated dormant skills I thought had sadly consigned to the past, and I feel quite immersed in the future rather than left behind by it.

nodes.label: AI for social media/LinkedIn posts
nodes.label_negative: AI-generated social media posts not meeting personal standards
nodes.grounding_span: Social media/Linkedin posts. I know I'm fussy, but I haven't seen anything within a million miles of what I'd want to put my name to.

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: the bot has already saved me eons of time compared to what I had to deal with

nodes.label: Authentic self-expression and personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: I feel like I owe people in my close circle thoughts directly from my brain rather than bowdlerised by a bot

nodes.label: Professional competence and expertise
nodes.grounding_span: got an intervew within the hour for a role that we can charge three times as much for, in a role we don't really fully grasp yet

nodes.label: Personal growth and future immersion
nodes.grounding_span: I feel quite immersed in the future rather than left behind by it

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for document processing
nodes.grounding_span: the bot has already saved me eons of time compared to what I had to deal with

nodes.label: Frustration with AI-generated copy requiring finessing
nodes.grounding_span: the time spent finessing to remove AI tells is almost not quite worth it atm

nodes.label: Resistance to AI for personal representation
nodes.grounding_span: I still can't hand the reigns over to a bot for communications that represent ME

nodes.label: Positive engagement with AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: for generating copy we tend to ping and pong between the two of us until I'm happy

nodes.label: Excitement about AI for building expertise
nodes.grounding_span: got an intervew within the hour for a role that we can charge three times as much for

nodes.label: Enthusiasm about AI bridging tech gap
nodes.grounding_span: what I love about AI is it bridges that gap that has built up over the years

nodes.label: Dismissal of AI for social media posts
nodes.grounding_span: I really can't see me attempting that again using AI for a while

nodes.label: Iterative refinement and ping-pong collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: for generating copy we tend to ping and pong between the two of us until I'm happy

nodes.label: Domain-specific boundary setting for AI use
nodes.grounding_span: if it's an admin/box ticking thing, yeah sure, I'll use a bot- but if I'm expressing something, no
